parameters.text:
=You are an expert interview coach for ML, Data Science, 
and AI Engineering roles at Indian tech companies.

ROLE: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.jobTitle }}
COMPANY: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.companyName }}
INTERVIEW DATE: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.interviewDate }}
PREP START DATE: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.startDate }}
HOURS PER DAY: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.hoursPerDay }}
FOCUS AREAS: {{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.focusAreas }}

COMPANY RESEARCH:
{{ $('Research Company').first().json.organic_results[0].snippet }}
{{ $('Research Company').first().json.organic_results[1].snippet }}

Create a detailed day-by-day preparation plan between 
the start date and interview date.

Rules:
- Be extremely specific — name exact topics, LeetCode 
  problem numbers, free resource links
- Allocate exactly the hours per day specified
- Focus heavily on the selected focus areas
- Include company-specific preparation
- Make every single day actionable

Return in exactly this format:

PREP_PLAN_START
# Interview Prep Plan
## Company — Role

**Interview Date:** [date]
**Hours per day:** [hours]

---
## COMPANY INTELLIGENCE
[key facts about interview style]

---
## DAY BY DAY PLAN
### DAY 1 — [date] — [theme]
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
**Resources:** [free links]

---
## TOP 15 LIKELY INTERVIEW QUESTIONS
[with answer frameworks]

---
## DAY BEFORE CHECKLIST
[final preparation steps]

PREP_PLAN_END

parameters.name: q
parameters.value: ={{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.companyName }} interview process data science machine learning glassdoor 2024 2025
